Who we work with

Built for the people who are tired of doing it all.

Summit VA fits four kinds of operators especially well. If you're stuck at the "doing everything myself" stage, that stage is the bottleneck.

01

Business owners drowning in ops

You need an OBM and real systems, not another assistant to manage. We build the engine so the work runs without you.

OBM + systems
02

Music artists & creators

You need a project manager who actually ships releases, not just ideas. We keep the calendar, rollout and details on track.

Project management
03

Coaches & consultants

You need client delivery systems, not another course. We make onboarding, scheduling and follow-up effortless.

Client delivery
04

Real estate agents

You need lead nurture and follow-up systems, not just more posts. We keep your pipeline warm and nothing slips.

Lead nurture
How we'd approach it

A look at our capabilities in action

Three industries we know well — the bottleneck we'd target first, and exactly what we'd build to fix it.

Music & creative talent

Booking inquiries shouldn't sit for days

The bottleneck
No EPK ready when a promoter asks. No prep before a label call. Inquiries pile up in DMs with no system behind them.
Press-ready EPK, sendable in minutes
Call prep brief before every conversation
A booking inbox that actually gets answered
Real estate — agents

Leads go cold while you're at a showing

The bottleneck
Listings, showings and paperwork all running at once. There's no one dedicated to following up while you're elsewhere.
Lead follow-up inside 24 hours, every time
A listing tracker covering every active property
Calendar and showing logistics off your plate
Real estate — developers

Multiple projects, one scattered status

The bottleneck
Investor updates and contractor details live in someone's head or a messy spreadsheet. Decisions slow down because no one has a clean view.
A project dashboard by phase and budget
Recurring investor reporting, done for you
One place for contractor and vendor comms
Sample work

What this looks like, built.

A look at the systems we'd put in place, shown through sample deliverables rather than testimonials. Each card reflects the kind of work behind a Summit VA engagement.

01
Sample work

CRM cleanup & lead pipeline

Client type: Real estate agent
The challenge
Leads were scattered across WhatsApp, email, and spreadsheets, with no single source of truth.
Organized contacts into one CRM
Built clear lead stages
Created follow-up workflows
Implemented pipeline tracking
OutcomeNo leads slipped through the cracks, and follow-ups became consistent.
02
Sample work

Operations hub

Client type: Coach / consultant
The challenge
Client onboarding and day-to-day operations were handled manually, with no documented process.
Built a Notion operations hub
Created clear SOPs
Organized recurring workflows
Structured recurring tasks
OutcomeSmoother client delivery and a noticeably lighter administrative load.
03
Sample work

Artist release management

Client type: Independent music artist
The challenge
Release planning and promotional activity had no structure behind them, and deadlines were easy to miss.
Built a release calendar
Managed the rollout timeline
Organized creative assets
Coordinated deadlines across the team
OutcomeLaunches became structured, and deadlines were consistently met.
04
Sample work

Executive support system

Client type: Founder
The challenge
Inbox overload and scheduling chaos were quietly consuming hours every week.
Inbox management
Calendar optimization
Meeting preparation workflows
A repeatable executive support system
OutcomeRecovered hours each week, redirected back to strategic work.
Your next steps

A calm, deliberate onboarding.

No long ramp-up and no guesswork. Here's exactly how we go from first call to a back office that runs itself.

01

Strategy call

We map where your time is going and where support makes the biggest difference, fast.

02

Audit & plan

We document your current workflow and design a clear systems map tailored to your business.

03

Embed & delegate

We take the repetitive work off your plate and set up the tools and SOPs behind it.

04

Optimize & scale

We refine the engine each week so it keeps running cleanly as you grow.

Inside the systems

The deliverables that move the needle.

A look at the actual format of the assets we build — organized, export-ready, and handed straight back to you. Real sample deliverables from our toolkit.

Notion Template

Task & Project Manager

Full Notion workspace with project tracking, daily planner, and task management by owner and status.

CRM Template

Sales Pipeline CRM

Notion-based CRM with leads, deals, pipeline stages, activities, revenue tracking and forecasting.

Artist EPK

Music EPK (Canva)

Press-ready Electronic Press Kit designed in Canva — cover page, bio, and media-ready layout.

Artist EPK

Electronic Press Kit

Full artist press kit with bio, career highlights, streaming stats and booking information.

Executive Report

Executive Summary Report

Professional project executive summary with financial overview, KPIs, deliverable timeline and risk tracking.

Notion CRM

Guests & Clients Database

Notion database tracking guests and clients with company, email, and booking details in one view.

Executive Support

Executive Calendar Management

Structured weekly calendar with CEO briefings, client calls, pipeline reviews and focus blocks.

Excel Template

Sample Itinerary Planner

Excel-based itinerary with daily cost breakdown by transport, meals and extras.

Sales Tracker

Sales Pipeline Tracker

Quarterly sales pipeline tracker with deal stages, win probability, weighted forecast and next actions.

Meet the founder

The woman behind the movement.

Executive Assistant Talent Sourcer Product Manager Social Worker Model

Summit VA Agency wasn't built in a boardroom, with investors, or with a team. It was built because Oluwafunmilayo had seen enough — enough founders drowning in emails, meetings and operational noise that had nothing to do with their vision. Enough talented professionals doing great work in the background and going unseen.

Summit VA exists for two people: the founder who is tired of doing it all and ready to lead, and the skilled remote professional ready to finally be valued for the work they're great at.

"This is not just an agency. This is a movement."

Good to know

Questions, answered.

What does a Summit VA actually do?
Anything repetitive and remote that's pulling you away from leading. That spans inbox and calendar management, customer service and CRM, operations and systems, project and team management, financial tracking and invoicing, lead generation, prospecting, and SOP documentation. We start with the work eating most of your week.
Who do you work best with?
Business owners drowning in operations, music artists and creators who need releases shipped, coaches and consultants who need client delivery systems, and real estate agents who need lead nurture and follow-up. If you're stuck doing everything yourself, you're exactly who we built this for.
How do we get started?
Take the short 2-minute qualifier so we can prepare, then book a free strategy discovery call. On the call we map where your time is going and where support makes the biggest difference. You leave with a clear picture of what working together looks like.
Do you document our processes?
Yes. As we take work on, we write it down as clear SOPs and a systems map. Your business stops living only in your head, which makes you easier to scale and far less dependent on any one person.
I've had a bad VA experience before. How is this different?
Most VA relationships break down because you end up managing the assistant. Summit VA brings executive-level thinking and real systems, so work gets handled proactively, communication stays clear, and you're not retraining someone every week.
What does it cost?
Support is tailored to what your business actually needs, so pricing is set after your strategy call. The qualifier asks about your budget range so the conversation is grounded and useful from the first minute.

Stop managing. Start leading.

Book a free strategy discovery call and see how quickly your operations can run without you holding every piece.
